metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the emobility domain.

children.name: Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway
children.description: Securely connects to chargers via OCPP/OCPP-compliant protocols and manages real-time device interactions.

children.name: Charge Point Management
children.description: Platform tools for commissioning, configuring, monitoring, and maintaining large inventories of EV charge points and network assets. It supports multi-tenant and global scale management. (CP Management product) :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

children.name: Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations
children.description: Provides real-time visibility, diagnostics, alerting, and remote actions across deployed infrastructure.

children.name: Session Orchestration
children.description: Manages charging sessions end-to-end including start/stop actions, status correlation, and session data aggregation.

children.name: Fleet Management
children.description: Tools tailored to support charging operations for vehicle fleets, including usage tracking, driver assignments, and billing incentives. (Fleet Management product) :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

children.name: Driver Authorization Service
children.description: Validates tokens, RFID users, and credentials to authorize EV drivers to start charging with policy checks.

children.name: Identity & Access Management
children.description: Handles multi-tenant user identities, roles, permissions, and access control for operators, partners, and admins.

children.name: Accessibility & Location Publishing
children.description: Manages visibility and accessibility of charge points for drivers and partners, including external APIs.

children.name: Smart Charging Engine
children.description: Optimizes charging power and schedules based on grid capacity, renewable generation, and site constraints. (Smart Charging product) :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}

children.name: Site Energy Model & Constraints Management
children.description: Models site grid constraints, energy usage, and power distribution preferences for optimized charging.

children.name: Tariff & Pricing Management
children.description: Supports flexible tariff creation, pricing schemes, dynamic pricing, and contract-level rate plans. (Billing & Payments product) :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}

children.name: Metering, Rating & Transaction Ledger
children.description: Converts metered energy data into billing quantities, applies tariffs, and maintains a financial ledger for reconciliation.

children.name: Billing, Invoicing & Settlement
children.description: Generates invoices, manages payments, supports pre/post-paid models and settlement between parties. (Billing & Payments product) :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}

children.name: Roaming Hub & Interoperability Gateway
children.description: Connects CPOs and eMSPs enabling seamless roaming, supporting multiple roaming standards to extend driver access. (Roaming product) :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}

children.name: Partner Management
children.description: Onboards roaming partners, manages credentials, routing rules, and agreements for cross-network services.

children.name: Roaming Transaction Exchange & Dispute Handling
children.description: Handles roaming session exchanges (CDRs), validations, settlements, and dispute workflows.

children.name: EV Driver App
children.description: Driver-facing mobile/web application for locating chargers, session control, account management, and payments. (EV Driver app product) :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7}

children.name: API Gateway & Developer Platform
children.description: Unified APIs, keys, throttling, and documentation for external integrations and partner ecosystems.

children.name: Eventing & Telemetry Pipeline
children.description: Streams charger telemetry, session events, and roaming messages for real-time processing and analytics.

children.name: Operational & Analytical Data Stores
children.description: Transactional and analytical data stores for reporting, KPIs, business intelligence, and forecasting.

children.name: Observability & Incident Management
children.description: Platform-wide metrics, logging, alerting, and incident response to ensure reliability and uptime.

children.name: Security, Compliance & Audit
children.description: Manages secure communications, certificates, compliance auditing, and platform security controls.

children.name: Analytics & Reporting
children.description: Dashboards, performance metrics, financial and operational reporting across the platform.

children.name: Enterprise Integration Layer
children.description: Connectors and canonical models to integrate with ERP, CRM, payment systems, and enterprise platforms.

children.name: Contract & Customer Management
children.description: Manages customer accounts, contractual relationships, tokens, and customer lifecycle.
